hero.subheadline: The secure, privacy-first ledger to track expenses, forecast budgets, and monitor assets — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: Your finances.
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from chaos to clarity. No banks required.

s1.title: Log Every Movement
s1.desc: Record income, expenses, and internal transfers. Mark uncertain entries for the Action Center review inbox.

s2.title: Analyze & Categorize
s2.desc: Instantly see spending by category with our donut chart. Use smart filters to drill into any timeframe or domain.

s3.title: Fund Your Goals
s3.desc: Create Capital Reserves for any saving goal. Use Quick Fund to allocate money while keeping your ledger accurate.

s4.title: Track Your Wealth
s4.desc: Log investment snapshots and watch your Net Worth evolve over time. Every asset class, in one private view.

faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Vault and your privacy.
faq.a1: Yes. Vault is built on a privacy-centric architecture. Your data is encrypted with 256-bit AES before ever leaving your device. We don't sell your data because we can't see it.
faq.q2: Do I need to connect my bank?
faq.a2: No. Vault is a privacy-first ledger designed for manual entry or secure imports. We believe the most accurate financial data is the one you control, not the one a bank API serves you.
faq.q3: What types of transactions does Vault support?
faq.a3: Vault supports three transaction types: Income (salary, freelance), Expense (purchases, bills), and Transfer (internal movements to savings reserves). Transfers are excluded from spending analytics to keep your reports accurate.
faq.a4: Capital Reserves are virtual savings goals decoupled from your bank accounts. You can set a target, fund it via a linked category, and track progress with our two-step Quick Fund feature that simultaneously updates the reserve and logs a transfer in your ledger.

footer.slogan: The privacy-first financial command center. Track your wealth, forecast your future, and own your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: May 2026
privacy.p1: Vault is built with a privacy-first philosophy. Your financial data is encrypted and stored on your device. We use Supabase as a backend for secure synchronization, but we do not have the keys to decrypt your private information.
privacy.p2: We do not sell your data, we do not track your behavior for advertising, and we never share your financial records with third-party brokers.
privacy.p3: By using Vault, you are choosing a tool that respects your digital sovereignty. Your data belongs to you, and you alone.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Clear, honest, and simple.
terms.p1: Vault is provided as-is. While we strive for 100% accuracy in our calculations and 100% security in our encryption, you are responsible for your own financial decisions.
terms.p2: The 'Digital Private Vault' is a community-supported project. We don't run ads or sell data; we rely on contributions from users like you to keep the servers running.
terms.p3: You own your data. You can export it or delete it at any time. We don't lock you in.
terms.agreementDesc: By accessing or using Vault, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

helpDrawer.title: Vault Command Guide
helpDrawer.reservesDesc: Reserves are allocated funds that are excluded from your 'Safe-to-Spend' calculation, allowing you to set aside money for taxes, large purchases, or emergencies.
helpDrawer.reviewDesc: Transactions imported from external sources or generated automatically may be flagged for review to ensure they are categorized correctly before affecting your metrics.
helpDrawer.investmentsDesc: To record the value of your investments, use the 'Log Snapshot' button on the Investments page. This creates a point-in-time record of your portfolio's current value.

support.title: A note from the developer
support.subtitle: Help keep Vault running
support.p1: Hi! I'm a solo developer based in Spain. I had the idea to build an app that perfectly fit my personal finance needs and decided to share it with the world. I don't sell your data and I will never run ads.
support.p2: Every feature is 100% free. My only goal today is to keep the database running. If Vault helps you manage your expenses, consider chipping in to help cover the server maintenance. Thanks! ;)
